samples.input: Hi there, I wanted to mention that one of the emergency lights in the hallway isn't working properly. It's not a pressing issue since the other lights are fine, but I thought it would be good to let you know. Thanks for your usual great service!

Hi there, I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to bring to your attention an issue we've been experiencing with the elevator in our building. It has been stopping between floors intermittently, which is not only inconvenient but also quite concerning for safety. While it's not an emergency since we can still use the stairs, it's definitely something that needs to be addressed soon to avoid any potential hazards. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Hi there, I recently noticed some potential safety hazards in the facility. There are exposed wires near the entrance and a wet floor sign that hasn't been moved despite the area being dry now. These issues need to be addressed to prevent any accidents. Please take care of these as soon as possible. Thank you for your attention to these matters.
